name: MM-Fi
summary: Synchronized WiFi, RGB-D, LiDAR, and mmWave data with action and pose annotations for daily and rehabilitation activities.

hardware.platform: TP-Link N750 access points and synchronized sensor platform

settings.scenario: Daily and rehabilitation actions in two rooms and four platform settings

standardization.notes: Do not upsample the released 10 Hz WiFi stream by default; retain 3×114 CSI dimensions.
